prompt:
You are the primary orchestrator for a new infrastructure project. Read the attached master_instructions.md carefully. You have two initial tasks:

1. Set up the FastAPI file structure for Workspace 1 (Alt_git) including the /telemetry/crash endpoint required for asynchronous log capture. Deploy it to Modal using the AG_MODAL_TOKEN credentials.
2. Add the attached doc_ingestion.py script to Workspace 2 (dev_fleet). Deploy it using the DF_MODAL_TOKEN credentials and trigger a manual run so our offline documentation volume is populated.

Verify both are running and report back your status.
